headline: SQL Injection
description: SQL Injection is a code injection attack where malicious SQL statements are inserted into application queries through user input. It ranked #3 on the OWASP Top 10 (2021) and can lead to data theft, data loss, and complete system compromise.

citation.name: Web Application Security: A Comprehensive Guide (2025 Edition)
citation.author: multiple

citation.name: SQL Injection: Detection, Prevention, and Modern Threats (2025 Survey)
citation.author: multiple
